title: Northlight Data Announces $32M Series B
summary: Northlight Data closed a $32M Series B to expand its streaming data infrastructure.

title: Northlight Data Opens Beta for Streaming Ingestion
summary: The beta adds a new streaming ingestion path alongside the existing batch pipeline.

title: Northlight Data Publishes Annual Data Trust Report
summary: The report details retention, access controls, and audit practices across the platform.
